error.signature: CMake Warning (dev): Policy CMP0077 is not set: option() honors normal variables.

verdict.summary: CMake policy warning about deprecated behavior. Using OLD policy silences the warning but relies on behavior that will be removed.

dead_ends.action: Set cmake_policy(SET CMPxxxx OLD) to suppress the warning
dead_ends.why_fails: OLD behavior is deprecated and will be removed in future CMake versions. This is a ticking time bomb.

dead_ends.action: Pin cmake_minimum_required to an old version to avoid the policy
dead_ends.why_fails: Locks entire project to old CMake features and behavior, not just the single policy.

workarounds.action: Update code to comply with the NEW policy behavior
workarounds.how: cmake_policy(SET CMP0077 NEW)  # then update code to match new behavior

workarounds.action: Set cmake_minimum_required to a version where the policy defaults to NEW
workarounds.how: cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.24)  # CMP0077 defaults to NEW since 3.13

workarounds.action: Use cmake_policy(SET CMPxxxx NEW) explicitly in the relevant scope
workarounds.how: cmake_policy(SET CMP0077 NEW)  # only if you understand the behavioral change
